name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-27
title: test-resolve-scope.py test #4 is brittle — depends on first feature in find-feature.py list
description: test-resolve-scope.py lines 50-58 take first_feature = the first line of find-feature.py list output and assert it appears in the prompt. find-feature.py iteration order is alphabetic, but if formatting truncates or splits feature names oddly, the substring search could match unrelated content. More robust: check that AT LEAST ONE feature from the list appears in the prompt, not specifically the first one.

history.note: Wave 4 fix; verified by test/test-bug-fixes-wave4.py and test-resolve-scope.py
